subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Forgive Thy servant, who is hopeful on this day, and grant him triumph, prosperity and pardon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار بنده ات بامس امیدوار را بیامرز و از فوز و نجاح و عفو و سماح
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
